ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Midfielder, Defender, Goalkeeper) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "footedness" TEXT /* Footedness of the player (e.g., left, right) */,
  "previous_clubs" TEXT /* Previous clubs the player has played for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team plays in */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays home matches */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Stadium capacity */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2011/12) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, playoff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of player season statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "bonus" INTEGER /* Bonus points system (BPS) score */,
  "bps" INTEGER /* Bonus points */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets */,
  "creativity" REAL /* Creativity score */,
  "end_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the player at the end of the season */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "ict_index" REAL /* ICT index score */,
  "influence" REAL /* Influence score */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Number of own goals */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties missed */,
  "penalties_saved" INTEGER /* Number of penalties saved */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves */,
  "start_cost" REAL /* Cost of the player at the start of the season */,
  "threat" INTEGER /* Threat score */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points scored */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards */,
  "expected_goals" REAL /* Expected goals scored */,
  "expected_assists" REAL /* Expected assists */,
  "expected_clean_sheets" REAL /* Expected clean sheets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, scout, analyst) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player season statistics being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES player_season_stats ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., weather, opponent team stats) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Weather API, Team API) */,
  "data_url" TEXT /* URL to access the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to access the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected date of return from injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date the transfer occurred */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player transferred from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player transferred to */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixtures" (
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixture */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "fixture_date" TEXT /* Date of the fixture */,
  "fixture_time" TEXT /* Time of the fixture */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the fixture is played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the fixture (e.g., home win, away win, draw) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixtures_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixtures_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
